description.overview: Bred for fox hunting in packs, English Foxhounds are gentle, sociable dogs who thrive with company. They're rarely kept as pets.
description.history: The English Foxhound originated in England.
description.temperament: Known for being friendly, gentle, sociable.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their short, dense, hard coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: Bred for fox hunting in packs, English Foxhounds are gentle, sociable dogs who thrive with company. They're rarely kept as pets.
